title: BDRY - December 5, 2023
summary: Dry bulk rates surge at an unprecedented speed leaving traders stunned; Where do we go next? - The dry bulk China economic numbers subdued, but dry bulk rates disregard such bearish factors - Recent economic activity Dry bulk focus shifts back to fundamentals - Following a period of high uncertainty and significant disruptions
